full_text:
Su Lin (Xiaoyou)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Su Lin, styledXiaoyou, was born in Chenliu. A man of wide learning, he was an expert in orthography, linked Cao Cao with the Yellow Emperor. Su Lin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
